scripts.build: tsc --project tsconfig.json && (cd dist && zip -FS profile-api-lambda.zip index.js handler.js openrouter.js)
scripts.deploy:manual: pnpm run build && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name profile-api-lambda --zip-file fileb://dist/profile-api-lambda.zip --region ap-northeast-1 --profile profile-learning-local
